instructions.text: API 응답 처리 예제 - 사용자 데이터 필터링 및 정렬

compilation.vtCode:
; CLAUDELang v6.0 compiled to VT
; Generated code below

; API 응답 처리 예제 - 사용자 데이터 필터링 및 정렬
(define api_response (array (object ("id" 1) ("name" "Alice") ("age" 30) ("active" true)) (object ("id" 2) ("name" "Bob") ("age" 22) ("active" false)) (object ("id" 3) ("name" "Charlie") ("age" 35) ("active" true))))
; 활성 사용자만 필터링 (active == true)
(define active_users (call Array.filter api_response (fn (user) (property user "active"))))
; 각 사용자의 이름만 추출
(define active_names (call Array.map active_users (fn (user) (property user "name"))))
; 평균 나이 계산
(define total_age 0)
(define total_age (call Array.reduce active_users total_age (fn (sum user) (+ sum (property user "age")))))
(define active_count (call Array.length active_users))
(define average_age (/ total_age active_count))
; 결과 출력
(call IO.print "Active users:")
(call IO.print_array active_names)
(call IO.print (call String.concat "Average age of active users: " average_age))
